layout.spacing_system: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6 to p-8 inside cards, gap-6 for grids. Maintain optical alignment.
layout.page_structure: Fixed sidebar navigation (w-64) with a flexible main content area. Top header sticky with backdrop-blur-md, housing breadcrumbs and user profile.

grid_modes.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Follow 'The Control Room' protocol. High density, no wasted space.
grid_modes.kanban: flex flex-nowrap overflow-x-auto gap-4 pb-4 items-start. Use snap-x snap-mandatory for better touch scrolling.
grid_modes.workflow_strip: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-0 border border-zinc-200 rounded-lg divide-y md:divide-y-0 md:divide-x divide-zinc-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#0055FF] text-white hover:bg-[#003BCC] shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-zinc-900 border border-zinc-200 hover:bg-zinc-50 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#CC2F26] shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-600 hover:text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

cards.panel: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden
cards.metric: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-2 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
cards.kanban_task: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-lg p-4 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-zinc-300 cursor-pointer transition-all
cards.terminal_console: bg-zinc-950 rounded-xl p-4 border border-zinc-800 text-[#00C853] font-mono overflow-y-auto h-full min-h-[400px] shadow-inner

badges.neutral: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-700 border border-zinc-200
badges.success: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[#DCFCE7] text-[#166534] border border-[#BBF7D0]
badges.pending: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[#FEF9C3] text-[#854D0E] border border-[#FEF08A]

progress_bars.fill: h-full bg-[#0055FF] rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out

inputs.text: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-zinc-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-zinc-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0055FF] focus:border-transparent disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.dropzone: border-2 border-dashed border-zinc-300 hover:border-[#0055FF] bg-zinc-50/50 hover:bg-[#0055FF]/5 rounded-xl p-10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center transition-colors cursor-pointer text-center

icons.usage: Use icons for sidebar nav, metric cards, status indicators, and button prefixes. Keep them sized at 20px (w-5 h-5) for body context and 24px (w-6 h-6) for prominent UI elements.

specific_patterns.login_screen: Minimalist split screen. Left side: Stark white background, Google OAuth login button, centered with high-end typography (Chivo font). Right side: A solid #F4F4F5 panel displaying an abstract data geometric pattern or brand primary color fill.
specific_patterns.numbered_step_grid: Use a flex or grid container for steps (1 to 5). Each step has a circular number indicator (bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-500, active: bg-[#0055FF] text-white). Connect steps with a thin line. Used for Onboarding Phase tracking.
specific_patterns.live_testing_console: Split layout. Left pane: Form for API keys, device inputs, and Trigger Event actions. Right pane: Terminal UI displaying real-time JSON logs, styled with bg-zinc-950 and text-[#00C853] using JetBrains Mono. Include timestamp badges on log rows.
specific_patterns.attribution_verification: Structured data panel. Use Table or Description List to map API responses. Utilize Success/Error badges next to expected event parameters.
specific_patterns.apk_upload: Prominent drag-and-drop zone with a dashed border. Include a large upload icon, 'Browse or drag and drop' typography, and a sub-label 'Max size 200MB'. On file select, transition to an upload progress card displaying the file size and a progress fill.
specific_patterns.project_tracker: Dual view approach: Tabs for 'Kanban' and 'Table'. Kanban features vertical columns mapped to the 8 phases. Table view acts as an intricate spreadsheet for CSMs using standard Shadcn tables with dense rows.

testing_attributes.guideline: All interactive elements, forms, cards, and distinct UI blocks MUST include data-testid attributes formatted in kebab-case representing their role. Examples: data-testid='upload-apk-dropzone', data-testid='kanban-task-card', data-testid='trigger-event-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts for 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' via standard import in index.css.
Install `@phosphor-icons/react` and use it exclusively for all system icons.

Use Shadcn components extensively (Dialog, Button, Input, Progress, Tabs, Table) but customize them: reduce standard border-radius to md/lg, replace generic ring colors with brand primary #0055FF, and enforce sharp 1px borders (#E4E4E7).
For the Kanban board, build a custom flex layout with horizontal scroll. Do not force Shadcn tables for the Kanban view, keep Shadcn tables only for the Table view mode.
The Testing Console MUST have a dark 'terminal' aesthetic for the log output area, contrasting the overall Light Theme of the app to provide a clear technical focus area.
Implement 'Eyebrow' text (text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em]) extensively above inputs, metrics, and distinct panel sections to enforce the authoritative SaaS aesthetic.
Map the provided Unsplash avatar URLs to project owners directly. DO NOT use generic gray circles or text placeholders for avatars.
Strictly adhere to the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype: No soft gradients, prioritize absolute clarity, solid color blocking, and sharp typography.
